protein_name: Tyrosine kinase substrate that inhibits growth-factor-mediated activation of MAP kinase. Expression is restricted to liver. 2 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Biological Process: negative regulation of epithelial to mesenchymal transition; negative regulation of ERK1 and ERK2 cascade; negative regulation of intracellular signal transduction; negative regulation of lens fiber cell differentiation; negative regulation of transforming growth factor beta receptor signaling pathway; regulation of signal transduction
raw_fields.Alt. Names/Synonyms: Eve-3; SPRE3; Spred-3; SPRED3; sprouty related EVH1 domain containing 3; sprouty-related, EVH1 domain containing 3; Sprouty-related, EVH1 domain-containing protein 3
raw_fields.Basal Isoelectric point: 8.67 Predict pI for various phosphorylation states
raw_fields.CST Pathways: Growth And Differentiation Control by MAPKs
